productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Stripes Leatherette Black Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 27 cm Height: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather with copper and silver glossy effect on the outside and has a nylon inner lining Single handle doubling as a flap with a magentic closure One main compartment with a magnetic clasp A zippered compartment and a zippered mobile pouch Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
